style_a.name: 灰暗现实主义
style_a.prompt_suffix: handheld camera, film grain, desaturated cold tones, blue-grey color palette, urban isolation, dimly lit

style_b.name: 东方赛博神话
style_b.prompt_suffix: epic cyber mythology, golden and neon blue palette, weightless atmosphere, digital particles, majestic scale

music_sync.lyrics: [灵感碎片在空中重组] 灵感重组 编织出灵魂的战衣 / 平凡人也能 穿上不凡的铠甲

atmosphere.overall_mood: 全MV最华丽的变身段落——碎片重组为战衣，凡人蜕变为赛博战士
atmosphere.lighting: 金色爆发光 + 铠甲自发光

video_prompt: Epic transformation sequence: floating code fragments orbiting and assembling into golden cyber armor on the protagonist, dramatic lighting and particle effects, power-up scene, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 前副歌高潮段，鼓组达到最大密度，即将进入副歌
bgm.instruments: 重型合成器、管弦乐层叠、电子鼓
bgm.dynamics: 层叠推进→爆发前最高点

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角悬浮在数字空间中，身体周围金色纹路剧烈闪动，即将开始变身

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 悬浮，身体金色纹路脉动

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 变身即将开始——能量已积蓄到极限
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 能量脉动的低频嗡鸣，越来越密集
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A floating figure in golden digital space with golden circuit patterns pulsing intensely across their body, energy building to critical mass, golden particles swirling around them faster and faster, dramatic pre-transformation moment, epic cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 四面八方的代码碎片开始向主角飞来，如同磁铁吸引铁砂

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 张开双臂，吸引周围碎片

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 散落的灵感/代码碎片被召唤汇聚
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 金属碎片飞行的嗖嗖声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Thousands of golden code fragments and data shards flying from all directions toward a floating figure with arms spread wide, like a magnetic vortex attracting metal filings, the fragments streaming in golden trails, vast digital space background, epic scale, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 代码碎片包裹住主角全身，形成一个发光的金色茧

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 被碎片包裹，形成金色光茧

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 蛹化——旧的自我被包裹，等待新生
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Code fragments wrapping around and encasing a human figure in a glowing golden cocoon, the surface of the cocoon covered in streaming code and circuit patterns, orbiting shot around the luminous chrysalis floating in dark digital space, transformation cocoon, epic cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 金色光茧开始发出耀眼白光，表面裂纹出现
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 最后的孕育——裂纹中透出更强的光
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 裂纹声 + 能量压力升高的声音
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A golden cocoon in dark digital space beginning to crack with brilliant white and gold light shining through the fractures, the surface splitting with energy, light beams shooting out from the cracks, intense luminosity, pre-emergence moment, epic scale, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 光茧爆裂！主角身披金色赛博铠甲破茧而出，能量冲击波向四面扩散

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 破茧而出，金色铠甲加身，双臂展开

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 破茧重生！——全MV最高光瞬间之一
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 爆裂声 + 冲击波 + 铠甲金属碰撞声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Epic cocoon explosion moment, a figure bursting out wearing gleaming golden cyber armor, shockwave expanding outward shattering cocoon fragments, arms spread in triumph, golden armor with circuit-pattern details glowing, dramatic upward angle, brilliant golden light, energy shockwave, epic cyber mythology transformation complete, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 铠甲细节特写——肩甲、胸甲上流动的金色代码纹路，AR眼镜融合成面甲

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 转身展示铠甲，AR眼镜已融合为赛博面甲

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 细节展示——凡人的工具（AR眼镜）进化为战士的装备
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 铠甲关节的精密机械声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Detailed close-up of golden cyber armor with flowing golden code patterns on shoulder plates and chest plate, an AR visor fused into a sleek cyber face mask, intricate circuit details, golden light pulsing through the armor seams, high detail mechanical design, epic craftsmanship, cyber mythology armor, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 全身远景——金色铠甲战士悬浮在数字空间中，气场完全不同

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 以战士姿态悬浮，铠甲闪耀

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 完全蜕变——不再是那个透明的凡人
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 铠甲发出的持续能量嗡鸣
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Full body shot of a golden cyber-armored warrior floating majestically in vast digital space, dramatic pose, the armor gleaming with golden light and neon blue accents, imposing presence completely transformed from the invisible ordinary person, epic scale with digital architecture in background, low angle emphasizing power, cyber mythology warrior, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 铠甲战士举起右拳，拳头周围凝聚出金色能量旋涡

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 右拳高举，金色能量在拳头周围凝聚旋转

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 蓄力——为副歌的第一击做准备
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A golden cyber-armored warrior raising their right fist with golden energy spiraling and condensing around it, the energy growing more intense and concentrated, sparks and particles orbiting the fist, dramatic lighting, power charging up, pre-strike tension, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 铠甲战士猛然向前冲刺，金色尾焰拖曳——冲向下一段的战斗

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 全速冲刺飞行，身后拖出金色尾焰

transition.description: 加速冲刺——直接撞入副歌

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 全速前进！——向着终极之战冲锋
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A golden cyber-armored warrior flying at incredible speed through digital space leaving a brilliant golden flame trail behind, speed lines and motion blur emphasizing velocity, heading toward something massive ahead, golden afterburner effect, dynamic side tracking shot, epic charge, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio
